programmes.show_description: Chris Jackson and his fellow geologists head for the volcano Nyamulagira - one of the most active yet least explored volcanoes on the planet.
Expedition Borneo, 1: A team of explorers venture into the heart of the tropical island, Borneo. They begin by setting up camp and searching for the elusive clouded leopard.
Expedition Borneo, 2: While one team searches for jungle elephants, the mountaineers lose their way on a remote mountain peak.
Expedition Borneo, 3: The explorers have a close encounter with a giant python, and one of the team is bitten by a deadly coral snake.
Prisoner of War: The gripping, danger-filled World War II drama set in occupied Belgium, with distinguished actor Bernard Hepton. Lifeline capture a wounded Luftwaffe pilot.
Day of Wrath: Classic World War II drama series set in occupied Belgium. De Beers has plans which endanger both his own people and Lifeline.
Chris Jackson, Xand van Tulleken and Aldo Kane take part in an expedition to Nyiragongo - one of the world's most dangerous and spectacular volcanoes.
Shopping from Home.
Jeremy reviews the Nissan Cube and Renault Clio 182, Richard Hammond road tests the Cadillac CTS, and James tries out a modern take on a timeless classic in the Jaguar XJS.
Taxi for Hammond! Richard and James May try their hand at minicabbing and road test the Renault Scenic and the Ford C-Max, and the lads say 'hello' to guest Lionel Richie.
Jezza tests the Ford GT, Richard bids farewell to the Rover V8, James casts a critical eye over the Maserati Quattroporte and guest Martin Clunes doesn't behave badly at all.

Heroes of comedy Ronnie Barker and Ronnie Corbett with sketches including Send in the Clones and The Admirable Brighton.
The late, great Ronnies - Messrs Barker and Corbett - offer up more timeless comedy magic. The classic sketches include Village of the Smiths and Born to be Wild.
Laughter and levity with Barker and Corbett. Sketches include Office Party, Indian Cookery, Barn Dance, Water and Secret of the Sorcerer's Tomb.

Clovelly: Archaeologist Ben Robinson examines the history of Clovelly in Devon, looking at its transformation from fishing harbour to romantic Victorian seaside resort.
Shopping from Home.
On Hull docks, the team are called in after asylum seekers are discovered in a cargo container. Plus, there's a massive factory fire and firefighters battle to find workers.
There's a serious crash in the fog and the team battle to free a trucker trapped in his cab by twisted metal. A bizarre accident in a soft play centre leads to a suspected spinal injury.
A biker riding without a helmet crashes and the team launch a desperate fight to save his life as his horrified family look on. A man barricades himself into a canal boat.

Ambush: Series three of the classic World War II drama set in occupied Belgium. A convoy of rocket parts exposes Lifeline to sabotage, and Bradley makes his first mistake.
Just Light the Blue Touch Paper: Third series of the edgy World War II drama. It is finally time for Bradley to use his army of evaders to act against the V2 weapons.
Sound of Thunder: Third series of the edge-of-the-seat World War II drama. The Allied advance threatens to spark reprisals against the Lifeline collaborators.
Collaborator: World War II drama series set in occupied Belgium. As Albert is released, he is faced with his communist enemies, who see him as a collaborator.
Days of Judgement: Third series of the classic World War II drama set in occupied Belgium. The liberation brings terror for Lifeline. Monique disappears, along with Kessler.
Bridgehead: Series three of the classic World War II drama set in occupied Belgium. A new life begins for Monique, and Kessler has a new identity.
